---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Micafungin 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Micafungin</strong> 目前有 <strong>21 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Micafungin 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Mycamine is indicated for: Adults, adolescents ≥ 16 years of age and elderly  treatment of invasive candidiasis; treatment of oesophageal candidiasis in patients for whom intravenous therapy is...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>urinary tract infection (disease)（99.0%）</li>
<li>gonococcal urethritis（99.0%）</li>
<li>Ureaplasma urethritis（99.0%）</li>
<li>uterine inflammatory disease（98.7%）</li>
<li>xanthogranulomatous pyelonephritis（98.7%）</li>
<li>malignant pleural mesothelioma（98.1%）</li>
<li>malignant epithelioid mesothelioma（97.2%）</li>
<li>malignant visceral pleura tumor（97.1%）</li>
<li>sarcomatoid mesothelioma（97.1%）</li>
<li>urogenital tuberculosis（96.8%）</li>
<li>impetigo（94.8%）</li>
<li>cysticercosis（93.4%）</li>
<li>hordeolum（93.4%）</li>
<li>staphylococcal scalded skin syndrome（92.6%）</li>
<li>coenurosis（92.6%）</li>
<li>pleural neoplasm（92.0%）</li>
<li>candidemia（90.5%）</li>
<li>bullous impetigo（90.3%）</li>
<li>Clostridium infectious disease（88.8%）</li>
<li>herpes zoster（88.0%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/micafungin/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
